title: Per-assertion annotation-provenance + confidence; CI completeness check
context: M2 provenance enforcement. CI must block any release carrying an unsourced label. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Implement per-assertion annotation provenance and confidence capture plus a CI completeness check that blocks unsourced labels.
acceptanceCriteria: Each annotation assertion records source citation, method, and confidence per the AnnotationAssertion schema.
CI completeness check fails the build if any label lacks a source citation.
output: A pull request adding annotation-provenance capture and the CI completeness gate.
